branch_note: Artifacts written on branch p230a-daily539-backward-oos-extension-plan (user-authorized) because a repo PreToolUse hook blocks file writes on main. No commit/stage/push performed.
disclaimer: Plan-only. No DB write, no replay rows created, no registry change, no production/recommendation change, no P225 start, no backward replay generation executed. Not betting advice and not a guaranteed predictive edge.

1_phase0_verification.dirty_worktree_note: Pre-existing unrelated dirty/untracked files present; not touched, not staged, not cleaned.

2_candidate_recap.recorded_bet_semantics: Only bet-1 is recorded (bet_index=1). bet-1 of midfreq_fourier_2bet is PURE MidFreq (predict_midfreq), NOT Fourier. The 'fourier' component would be bet-2 and is NOT stored. The replay evidence is effectively a single-bet MidFreq signal despite the 2bet name.
2_candidate_recap.lifecycle_status: RETIRED (not ONLINE, not in production registry _ALL_ADAPTERS)

3_current_evidence_recap.baseline_derivation: theoretical random hypergeometric mean = pick(5) * draw(5) / pool(39) = 25/39 = 0.6410256410256411; era-invariant for DAILY_539 (pool/pick/draw unchanged across all history).

robustness_exclude_hit3.note: removing the 19 hit_count=3 rows drops mean below baseline

warmup_unreplayable_min_history_100.reason: MidfreqFourier2BetAdapter.min_history = 100; first 100 DAILY_539 draws have <100 prior history and would return replay_status=INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY.

current_state_4376_reconciliation.actual: un-replayed = 4365 backward + 11 forward = 4376 (EXACT). Strictly-backward = 4365. Replayable-backward after 100-draw warmup = 4265.
current_state_4376_reconciliation.verdict: CONFIRMED with refinement: 4376 includes 11 forward draws; truly-backward replayable count is 4265, not 4376.

4_backward_oos_data_inventory.daily539_replay_rows_clarification: The 34,680 DAILY_539 replay rows span MANY strategies; the candidate midfreq_fourier_2bet has exactly 1500 rows. Backward-OOS extension concerns ONLY the candidate slice (currently 0 backward rows for this strategy_id).

late_pre_p224_boundary_2017_to_2021_08.note: ends at 110000189, immediately before the existing window boundary 110000190

p224_era_boundary.meaning: first draw of the existing 1500-row P224 window; backward eras must end strictly before this.

draw_order_validation.ordering_rule: ORDER BY date ASC, CAST(draw AS INTEGER) ASC
draw_order_validation.verdict: CAST(draw AS INTEGER) order is perfectly monotonic with date (0 inversions). Leakage-safe chronological ordering confirmed. Never use string ORDER BY draw (per project DB rule).

required_source_modules.generator_template: scripts/p31b_wave1_daily539_retired_production_apply.py (causal-slice loop, single-draw runner _run_one_prediction, provenance hashing, transactional apply)
required_source_modules.adapter_registry_note: MidfreqFourier2BetAdapter is a P31A dry-run wrapper NOT registered in replay_strategy_registry._ALL_ADAPTERS; safe to reuse without registry side-effects.

feature_reconstruction_without_leakage.reason: predict_midfreq is pure-functional on history[-100:] (frequency mean-reversion). No external state (DB/files/env) is read during prediction. Deterministic -> reproducible -> no leakage when history is a strict causal slice.
feature_reconstruction_without_leakage.constraint: Requires >=100 prior DAILY_539 draws per target -> first 100 historical draws excluded (warmup). Effective replayable backward window = 4265 draws.

5_feasibility_analysis.determinism: Same algorithm + same fixed historical data => byte-stable predictions; provenance_hash = sha256(strategy_id|target_draw|sorted(numbers))[:16] for verification. Consistent with the existing 1500 in-window rows generated by the identical adapter.
5_feasibility_analysis.isolation_preference: ARTIFACT-ONLY dry-run FIRST (no DB). Then, only if authorized, temp-table/backup-DB rehearsal. Production apply is the LAST resort and requires explicit DB-write authorization.

6_leakage_guard.cutoff_rule: history_cutoff_draw = the immediately preceding DAILY_539 draw of target_draw in (date ASC, draw ASC) ordinal order.
6_leakage_guard.literal_minus_one_warning: The phrase 'target_draw - 1' MUST be interpreted as ORDINAL PREDECESSOR, NOT numeric subtraction. DAILY_539 draw IDs reset across ROC-year boundaries (e.g., 110000313 -> 111000001), so numeric target_draw-1 is WRONG at year boundaries. Use history = all_draws[:target_idx]; cutoff = history[-1]['draw'] (exactly what P31B does).
6_leakage_guard.no_same_draw_or_future_outcome: history slice is all_draws[:target_idx] (strictly before target). actual_numbers taken only from the target row itself, never fed into prediction.
6_leakage_guard.draw_order_validation_rule: Assert 0 date inversions under CAST(draw AS INTEGER) order before any run (verified now: 0).
6_leakage_guard.duplicate_target_protection: UNIQUE(lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index) on strategy_prediction_replays. Pre-run duplicate guard: assert 0 existing rows for (strategy_id=midfreq_fourier_2bet) with target_draw in the backward set.
post_generation_leakage_assertions: every predicted bet has exactly 5 distinct integers in [1..39]
predicted_special is NULL (DAILY_539 has no special)
6_leakage_guard.unique_key_strategy_if_db_write_authoriz: Reuse UNIQUE(lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, bet_index); backward rows differ from in-window rows only by target_draw so no collision. Tag with distinct provenance (see architecture) to keep backward rows separable.
rollback_backup_requirements_if_db_write: Take a full timestamped DB backup first (precedent: backups/p188_lottery_v2_backup_*.db).
Pre-flight assert total rows == 94924 (or the live baseline at run time).
BEGIN EXCLUSIVE transaction; rollback on ANY exception (P31B pattern).
Post-apply assert total rows == 94924 + inserted, inserted == expected, duplicates == 0.
Run replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py --strict post-apply; must remain PASS.

7_proposed_dry_run_backfill_architecture.principle: artifact-only before any DB write; deterministic reuse of the existing adapter; full provenance separability of backward rows from in-window rows.

p230b1_artifact_only_dry_run.goal: Generate backward-OOS predictions to an ARTIFACT FILE only. ZERO DB writes. Requires code-change authorization (new read-only script).
reads: draws (DAILY_539, ORDER BY date ASC, draw ASC)
p230b1_artifact_only_dry_run.expected_records: <= 4265 PREDICTED + up to 100 INSUFFICIENT_HISTORY if first-100 attempted (recommend skipping warmup -> exactly 4265 PREDICTED)

p230b2_temp_table_or_backup_db_rehearsal.goal: Load artifact rows into an ISOLATED temp DB copy or a temp table with dry_run=1, validate guards, NEVER into production rows.
isolation_options: temp DB copy (precedent P184/P185 rehearsal DBs)
or temp table within a backed-up DB
p230b2_temp_table_or_backup_db_rehearsal.guards: mirror P31B: pre-flight row count, duplicate guard by controlled_apply_id, BEGIN EXCLUSIVE, rollback on exception, post verification, drift guard PASS

p230c_validation.goal: Read-only validation/metrics over the P230B1 artifact (and/or temp rehearsal). No production write.

p230d_governance_and_commit.goal: Optional: commit artifacts + sync governance docs. Separate authorization.
p230d_governance_and_commit.note: Production apply (dry_run=0 into lottery_v2.db) is OUT OF SCOPE for the whole P230B/C chain unless a distinct explicit DB-write/backfill authorization is given.

provenance_separability.rationale: Distinct from the in-window P31B markers so analysis can always separate backward-OOS rows from the original 1500 in-window rows.

8_validation_metrics_and_gates.interpretation_caveat: Backward-OOS is a HISTORICAL EXTENSION across OLDER regimes, NOT true future OOS. It tests robustness across earlier regimes but CANNOT replace the P224B future 300/500-draw monitoring gate.
comparison_baselines: daily539_f4cold (requires its own backward replay for a fair comparison)
consensus baseline 0.68 (reconstructable only if competing strategies are also backfilled backward)

decision_gates_for_p230b_p230c.below_baseline: If backward-OOS mean is below baseline -> classify survivor as HISTORICAL ARTIFACT.
decision_gates_for_p230b_p230c.mixed: If mixed -> keep WAIT_FOR_OOS; do NOT start P225.
decision_gates_for_p230b_p230c.above_but_weak: If consistently above baseline but CI/p-value still weak -> keep NEEDS_MORE_OOS.
decision_gates_for_p230b_p230c.strong: If above baseline, block-stable, robust to hit_count=3 removal, robust to strongest-block removal, AND competitive vs baselines -> CTO MAY consider P230C deeper validation.
decision_gates_for_p230b_p230c.hard_ceiling: Even if backward-OOS passes, NO production promotion is allowed. P225 model design remains separately authorized only.

9_authorization_matrix.artifact_only_dry_run_p230b1: NOT YET — requires separate code-change authorization (new read-only script, no DB write)
9_authorization_matrix.db_write_backfill_p230b2_or_production: NOT AUTHORIZED — requires explicit 'YES DB write/backfill' authorization
9_authorization_matrix.commit_stage_push_branch_merge: Branch creation was separately authorized by the user for THIS artifact write only; commit/stage/push/merge remain NOT AUTHORIZED.

10_recommended_next_step.primary: Authorize P230B1 (code-only artifact dry-run generator) as the next task: a NEW read-only script that emits backward-OOS predictions for the 4265 replayable draws to an artifact file with full leakage assertions and provenance, writing ZERO DB rows.
10_recommended_next_step.then: Run P230C read-only validation on that artifact against the era/block splits and gates above.
10_recommended_next_step.defer: P230B2 (temp-table/backup-DB rehearsal) only after P230B1 artifact review AND explicit DB-write authorization. Production apply (dry_run=0) remains out of scope pending a distinct explicit DB-write/backfill authorization.
10_recommended_next_step.parallel_reminder: Backward-OOS does NOT substitute for the P224B future-OOS gate (>=300, preferred 500, NEW DAILY_539 draws). Passive monitoring continues regardless.
10_recommended_next_step.expected_db_effect_if_production_apply_e: 94924 -> up to 94924 + 4265 = 99189 rows (only if a future, separately-authorized production apply runs).

classification_rationale: Data sufficient (4265 replayable backward draws), schema intact and supportive (UNIQUE key, dry_run flag, full provenance columns), code feasibility confirmed (adapter + generator template reusable, deterministic, leakage-safe), no blockers. Not BLOCKED_INSUFFICIENT_DATA (4265 >> 0), not BLOCKED_SCHEMA (integrity ok, key present), not BLOCKED.
